title: Gold Foil Star Balloon,10Pcs Gold Star Shaped Foil Balloons,18Inch Helium Polyester Film Balloons for Graduation,Brithday,Engagement,Wedding Party Decorations
features: 10PCS STAR BALLOONS:You will get 10pcs 18Inch gold star balloons,ribbon.The gold star shaped balloons suitable for any party, can leave unforgettable memories for the guests attending the party,18Inch is large enough to better embellish your party.

MATERIAL:Our aluminium foil star balloons are made with good quality embossing technology,with neat edges, not easy to explode and leak,non-toxic and odourless,with vibrant colours, ideal for any decoration.Suitable for inflating with helium or air,after filling with helium, pinch the inflation port of the star balloon to seal it.

EASY TO USE:These helium polyester film star balloons can be filled with air or helium and inflated up to 90% to prevent them from getting too big and exploding.The set comes with a straw and ribbon,after the party is over,use the straw to deflate by inserting it into the inflation port,balloons can be reused.

WIDELY APPLICATION:Our gold star shaped balloons are great for many occasions including boys and girls, men and women's Birthday parties,Graduation,Gender Reveal,Engagement,Baby Shower,Marriage proposals,Bridal Shower parties,Anniversaries,Wedding indoor and outdoor decorations, photo shoot backdrops and other events.

WARM TIPS:Due to batch problems, some of the balloon color may have a slight color difference, is a normal phenomenon, please prevail in kind received. At the same time, please do not over-inflate the polyester film balloon or rub the balloon with sharp objects to avoid balloon explosion.
description: Star Balloons – 10PCS Star Balloons for Party Decorations Description: Key Features: 10PCS STAR BALLOONS: You will get 10pcs 18Inch gold star balloons, ribbon. The gold star shaped balloons suitable for any party, can leave unforgettable memories for the guests attending the party, 18Inch is large enough to better embellish your party. High-Quality Material – Made from durable polyester film with embossing technology, these balloons are non-toxic, odorless, and resistant to leaks and explosions. Suitable for helium or air inflation, they stay vibrant and full throughout your event. Easy to Inflate & Reuse – Simply fill with helium or air (up to 90% capacity to prevent over-expansion). Includes a straw for easy deflation, allowing you to reuse the balloons for future celebrations. Versatile for Any Occasion – Ideal for birthdays, graduations, gender reveals, engagements, baby showers, weddings, anniversaries, and photo backdrops. Perfect for both indoor and outdoor decorations. Warm Tips – Slight color variations may occur due to different production batches (actual product may vary slightly from images). Avoid over-inflating or exposing balloons to sharp objects to prevent bursting. For best results, use helium for floating effects or air for fixed decorations.Make your party unforgettable with these stunning star balloons! Order now and light up your celebration!
